case_title: MARTENSON DENNIS G. VS LI YANG GUANG

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,742.85 FILED BY MARTENSON DENNIS G. AS TO DEFENDANT LI YANG GUANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LI YANG GUANG
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY LI YANG GUANG AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MARTENSON DENNIS G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF MARTENSON DENNIS G.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-22-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTENSON DENNIS G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI YANG GUANG $3,742.85 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,800.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LI YANG GUANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MARTENSON DENNIS G. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LI YANG GUANG
